channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 free storage upgrade offer is back for a limited time — and this stackable coupon can save you even more
item.description: Samsung, JB Hi-Fi, The Good Guys and Amazon have all brought back free storage upgrades across the Galaxy S26 lineup, while the 1TB S26 Ultra gets a hefty discount.

item.title: 40+ home deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on cooling sheets, air purifiers, and top robot vacuums
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has some great home deals. We spotted savings on air purifiers, carpet cleaners, cooling bedding, and more.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is here and surprisingly good: We found 100+ deals on Apple, DJI, Sony, and Shark
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Shop the best deals on Apple, headphones, TVs, and more.

item.title: 30+ deals on Breville, Ninja, Nespresso, and more kitchen essentials are live in Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Blenders, espresso machines, air fryers, and more make up some of the best kitchen deals live during Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Handheld gaming PCs are in big trouble — and it's not a surprise to see what's responsible
item.description: The memory crisis is still a major issue with PC hardware, and handheld gaming devices may be in serious danger if the AI boom continues apace.

item.title: 'I'll switch to another brand': I polled over 1,000 Garmin users to see what they thought of Garmin's Connect+ premium tier, one year after its launch
item.description: One year later, Garmin users still aren't subscribing to Garmin Connect+, according to our survey.

item.title: These beauty deals show Amazons spring sale is a great time to stock up on skincare and K-beauty favorites
item.description: The Shark FlexStyle, Dyson Airwrap, K-beauty favorites, Ouai hair products and more are discounted during Amazon's spring sale.
